title: THUG Invitational/Season 4
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:THUG Invitational: Season 4}} {{Villager_esports}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=THUG Invitational: Season 4 |icon=Thug Invitational S4.png |tickername=THUG Invitational S4 |shortname=THUG Invitational S4 |image=Thug Invitational S4.png |type=Online |team_number=24 |series=THUG Invitational |organizer=Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://villageresports.in/ Villager |organizer2=Thug |organizer2-link= |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=5,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-01-27 |edate=2022-01-31 |twitter=8bit_thug |instagram=8bit_thug |web= |discord= |facebook= |loco=streamers/Thugwa |youtube=channel/UCV01cEjT9EGakHXILA_uZOQ |previous=THUG_Invitational/Season_3{{!}}Season 3 |next=THUG_Invitational/Season_5{{!}}Season 5 }} '''[[Thug]]''' in association with '''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''' present the fourth season of the BGMI invitational tournament ''Thug Invitational'' called the '''''Thug InvitationaL Season 4''''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=in |b1=Spero |b2=Mortal |b3=Thug |b4=kRaT }} {{box|break|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Guest Commentator |lang=in |b1=Sid|b1name=Siddhant Joshi|b1flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''THUG Invitational:''' 27th January 2022 to 31st January 2022.'' * ''24 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''4 matches to be played each day on 27,28 and 29th.'' * ''3 matches to be played each day on 30 and 31st.'' * ''18 matches to be played over a period of 5 days.'' * ''Each team will play 16 games over the course of five days.'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-16}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $6,857 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
